creator: denreg@mail.ee
text:
Hello, sorry for my english.
I can not go from freebsd 11.0 to 11.1 because of this bundle mediatomb + ffmpegthumbler because in the new version of the kernel 11.1 something was broken and when the file is opened on the telly the mediatomb immediately drops, and in the old system works fine.
I also checked on a separate piece of hardware with the installed system from scratch, updating via "freebsd-update" and installing packages via "pkg install"
under 11.0 works, if the mediatomb configuration is added, that there are icons of media files.
<ffmpegthumbnailer enabled="yes">
        <thumbnail-size>256</thumbnail-size>
        <seek-percentage>15</seek-percentage>
        <filmstrip-overlay>no</filmstrip-overlay>
        <workaround-bugs>no</workaround-bugs>
        <image-quality>6</image-quality>
      </ffmpegthumbnailer>
under 11.1 this falls
Made an experiment in the system 11.1 replaced the entire folder with the kernel from 11.0
The world 11.1 has turned out and the kernel and modules 11.0 and with such configuration the piece of iron has started and mediatomb + ffmpegthumbler did not fall from what I do a conclusion a new kernel ....
Bug core is not.
Quietly falls and all. Can that include it is necessary, and so freebsd on a default.
The log also does not swear, even if you run the mediatomb in debug.
